feed.title: SAP Community - SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central
feed.subtitle: SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Setting up Custom email templates for SuccessFactors Employee Central Time Sheet
entry.content:
I would like to check if we can set up custom email templates for SuccessFactors Employee Central Time Sheet.

We have different scenarios where we would like to set up custom Email templates but we could not find any tokens that can be used to refer EC Time Sheet data. Like Time Sheet Start Date, Time sheet End Date, Status of the Time Sheet, Time Sheet Duration etc.

Has some one prepared custom email templates with above Time Sheet data included in the template ?

entry.title: employee central core certification preparation
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Can anyone guide me about the certification exam of Employee central core like :-

1. What is the format of the exam ?

2.From where i can get the practice questions ?

3.How do i know that now i am fully prepared for the exam  ?

4.How to clear it in my first attempt and what should my next plan after this certification?

Thanks & Regards

Kartik Chijwani

entry.title: Timesheet Module Behavior on Attendance and Leave Collision
entry.content:
Hello Experts,


I’m seeking your guidance regarding a standard behavior observed in the Timesheet module, specifically related to entry blocking when a collision occurs on a single day.

Issue Summary:
When both attendance and leave type (PL, CL,SL, Out Door Duty) or any absences are recorded on the same day, the system flags a collision error. As a result, it blocks timesheet entries for the remaining days of that week. However, once the collision is resolved, the timesheet updates correctly for the entire week.

We understand that this is standard system behavior.

Request for Suggestions:
Is there a way to prevent the system from blocking the remaining days of the week when such a conflict occurs on just one day?

If anyone has implemented a workaround or alternative solution to handle this scenario more gracefully, we would greatly appreciate your insights or suggestions.

entry.title: Offcycle event batch to "termination details".
entry.content: In SuccessFactors we have offcycle event batch for job information and employment details section. Can't that be added to termination details as well? Because to the standard field "Ok To Rehire" I think it should not always be a manual data change. For example in our client side we have a rule saying that a user cannot be "ok to rehire = NO" for more than 20 years. So they suggested us to make make an automation based on a custom date field where they decide when the employee should be ok to be rehired again. It's obviously going to be a future dated field and there is no rules to make it happen. So off cycle event batch could have been a good option if that was feasible. Currently we might have to do it manually.

entry.title: DRTM - Data Retention Management & Purge for Inactive users
entry.content: Documentation

entry.title: Limitation on Quantity 1-5 fields on Accrual Calculation Account Type Base Object
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

Can we define custom fields like quantity6, quantity7 in following 2 objects under Configure Object Definition? 

  1. Accrual Calculation Account Type Base
  2. Accrual Calculation Base

As of now, we do have actual quantity, quantity 1 to 5 standard SF fields. These fields are used to generate accruals from recorded timesheet. We are almost using all these fields. We would like to check if we can define custom fields after quantity5 and use those fields to generate accrual from timesheet via Integration Centre. 

Would like to check if SAP SuccessFactors product support custom fields in Accrual Calculation Account Type Base Object. 

Thanks & Regards,
Arijit

Note - We do not have time tracking license.

entry.title: Auto Person ID generation for Hire/Rehire
entry.content:
Hi,

I created an auto person ID generation rule and assigned it to the personInfo HRIS element in Manage Business Configuration (MBC), but the rule is not triggering.

entry.title: Do we have any SAP standard pre-delivered API in SAP ECC to Send Cost Center through MDI to SF_EC ?
entry.content:
I'm reaching out to gather your inputs on the below points that is regarding the integration of Cost Center master data from SAP ECC Finance to MDI through CPI, particularly given that the ODTFINCC 600 component will not be installed in SAP ECC.

We've got a fair understanding on CPI connects to MDI through the MDI adapter and sends data to SuccessFactors, but these below two points we are seeking Inputs.

1. Do we have any SAP's standard pre-delivered API in SAP ECC that can facilitate the sending of Cost Center master data to MDI through CPI?2. Could you share with us the standard SAP delivered Cost Center change pointer driver program that can trigger the API call to the MDI system?

entry.title: Success Factors to AD integration question
entry.content:
We are enabling the SAP Success factors to AD integration using the standard pattern of HR driven provisioning. 

LINK

We have recently merged multiple domains into one and now several users have an existing employee ID which does not  match their employee ID from Success Factors, we want to ensure the employee number from Success factors is Primary but at the same time not create new Entries in AD for existing users when this employee number does not match between Entra and SF. 

As per the documentation - 
if personIdExternal maps to employeeId and is set as the matching attribute, then the provisioning service uses the personIdExternal value to search for the user with employeeId filter.
If a user match is found, then it updates the target attributes.
If no match is found, then it creates a new entry in the target.

I wanted to know if we can have multiple checks before a new ID is created in AD/Entra ie check for personIDExternal and if not found, then check with firstName and lastName and if not found, then create a new entry else update. 

Any recommendations here would be very helpful, thank you.

entry.title: employee time custom fields
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

How can you configure custom fields in SuccessFactors Employee Time?

How can you integrate these custom fields in ESS UIs?

Thank you.

entry.title: Support Needed for Deprecated Basic Scenario and Missing Parameters in Time Off Rules
entry.content:
With the deprecation of basic scenarios in SAP SuccessFactors, several parameters previously available in Time Off business rules are no longer supported. This significantly affects existing rule configurations that rely on those parameters to calculate accruals, validate conditions, or trigger custom logic.

Can SAP provide a clear migration path, backward compatibility options, or alternative solutions specifically for Time Off rules, to ensure that current functionality remains intact during the transition?

entry.title: Position Workflow Comment is Auto Filled
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

While submitting Position Workflow Request for approval, Comment is being auto filled.
Please let me know if this is standard behavior and share any KBA in support of this behavior.

entry.title: PayComponentNon Recurring, OneTime Payments is it possible to restrict edit access forfilled records
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement, Is it possible to restrict the edit access to filled records in "OneTime Payments" portlet and provide access to insert new records for HR team?

entry.title: Deleting unused instance.
entry.content:
Hi team,

If the preview & production instances are actively used, but the development instance is hardly used, is it okay to delete the dev instance? Are there no problems that may arise from deleting an instance (in our case, the dev instance) entirely?

Thanks,
Jiho

entry.title: Manager (DACS) cannot manage the global assignment of his employee (DAZO)
entry.content:
Note: he can "ADD" a global assignment. But once added, he cannot manage it. This is strange.
What would happen if we also grant edit possibilities to the (local) HR Administrator role?

FYI:

1. Without adding in a target group, manager has to manage his employee's global assignment. Is there any way that we can add it from permissions....!

2. Also Is there a way we can create a dynamic group based upon the field "Is On Global Assignment"?

entry.title: Work Experience Portlet & RBP Restrictions Limitations in SAP SF Spotlight
entry.content:
In Work Experience card, a user can view field values from Internal Job History for which the user does not have permission to. This is expected behaviour currently, field level permissions are not respected in the Work Experience card.

A key limitation to be aware of when using SAP Spotlight with SuccessFactors Work Experience (Internal Job History) data is the lack of enforcement of Role-Based Permission (RBP) restrictions based on assignment groups.

What this means in practice:

  1. Users from one region or assignment group may be able to view Work Experience data belonging to other regions, potentially exposing sensitive employee information.
  2. This poses a GDPR compliance risk when data visibility crosses geographic or organizational boundaries unintentionally.
  3. The Work Experience portlet is also not supported on the Full latest People Profile UI from 2H 2025, limiting functionality and experience.

Current workaround:

As of now we have 2 workarounds for the Standard Work Experience portlet:

1. To restrict the visibility of the Work Experience section in Spotlight is by adjusting this RBP permission: Employee Central Effective Dated Entities > Job Information Actions (View Current)

However, this workaround hides users' job information entirely, not just the Work Experience section.

2. Go to Admin Center > Configure Latest People Profile > Choose the Spotlight option > Disable Visibility of Spotlight card.

Recommended Long-Term Solution

For customers facing this issue with the standard Internal Job History portlet, a viable approach is to:

  • Create a custom MDF object
  • Flow data from Job Information to this custom MDF object
  • Display the custom MDF object on the Latest People Profile instead of the standard Work Experience card

This approach respects RBP restrictions and aligns with the new People Profile UI.

We strongly recommend customers submit an enhancement request to SAP for introducing RBP support in the Work Experience card in Spotlight.

If you want these RBP issue to be fix for the future enhancements, SAP team will consider all enhancement requests raised in the community and will consider this request as an option for a future release.

Please see the attached KBA 2090228 - How to Submit Ideas for SAP SuccessFactors Products on how to do this.

entry.title: Manager's name is not appearing in the Workflow "CC"
entry.content:
Hi Team,

The manager's name is not appearing in the workflow even the mapping is correct in workflow, Manager's name is appearing in the Employee's Job Information, and Managerial details are maintained like personal info, first, last name etc....

Workflow Mapping

Manager's Name is appearing in the team members job info

When workflow appears, Manager's name is not appearing in CC (Manager name is - Oliver Hamilton)

Thanks in Advance...

entry.title: Hands-on Practice for SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core Academy is temporarily unavailable
entry.content:
Hi everyone!

Has anyone else been experiencing issues with the "SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Core Academy" practice system being temporarily unavailable recently? Some of my colleagues and I are currently working towards EC Core certification, but system downtimes are making it difficult to proceed...

Curious to hear whether you have experienced the same lately.

Best, Elina

entry.title: How to get Workflow Status Values in Business Rule?
entry.content:
How to get Workflow Status Values in Business Rules. (So, it will show Workflow Values like Approved, Declined, Withdrawn)

Thanks in Advance....

entry.title: Custom Navigation with User ID as Parameter
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to add a custom button to the SAP SuccessFactors Employee Profile. When clicked, the button should redirect the user to an external website, with the user's User ID passed as a URL parameter.

This functionality is intended to enable seamless integration between SuccessFactors and the external system.

Please let me know how we can proceed with this implementation.

Thank you.
